response.justification: Despite a strong background in software engineering and diverse technical experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, high-performance systems, or secure embedded environments required for this role. Their recent work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, outdated C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, which is insufficient to meet the core requirement of 8–12 years of C++ development.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to deliver scalable systems and lead developer education initiatives
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9+ years
Lacks demonstrated exposure to IEC 62443, industrial cybersecurity, or MQTT/Modbus protocols
No evidence of on-premises industrial automation platform development or multi-threaded C++ systems
